sys_script_client.description: 2.8.0 | 2022-08-12 | raj | DFCT0011168 - The task order should be on the create form for the second subtask created under a task shows the task order field based on two conditions: - if the parent field is not empty - if the parent task has more than 2 subtasks
sys_script_client.name: Task - onLoad Show/Hide Task Order
